message:
fix(ingest): eliminate redundant HashMap double-lookup in OutputCache hit path

The output cache dedup check called get() to read the pane state, then
immediately called get_mut() on the same key to update last_updated.
Now uses get_mut() from the start, allowing the mutable reference to
update last_updated directly without a second lookup.

Also adds missing ApiResponse test import to web.rs after module decomposition.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
